compliance: HIPAA — do not include patient-identifiable information
No specific diagnoses or treatment plans for real patients
No specific drug dosages presented as advice
Clinical decision support only — not a substitute for professional judgement
clarity_requirements: Specify patient population or case type (e.g., adult, paediatric, ICU)
State the clinical context (e.g., outpatient, emergency, chronic care)
Specify output format (SOAP note, differential list, discharge summary)
Indicate level of clinical detail required
good_patterns: Summarise the following de-identified clinical note in SOAP format:
Extract ICD-10 codes from the following clinical documentation:
List the top 5 differentials for a 45-year-old presenting with chest pain and diaphoresis:
Translate the following discharge summary into patient-friendly language (grade 6 reading level):
bad_patterns: What medication should I give John Smith for his diabetes?
Tell me if my patient (DOB 12/03/1978, MRN 4456221) has cancer
Diagnose this person based on their symptoms
